title: 妈妈买绿豆

characters.name: 小满
characters.visual: 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist

characters.name: 妈妈
characters.visual: 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek

characters.name: 老板
characters.visual: 50-year-old man, stocky build, bald with gray stubble, white vest and brown trousers, thick round glasses

style: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6

scenes.story_text: 清晨，小满听见厨房里传来锅盖碰响的声音，揉着眼睛跑过去问：「妈妈，今天吃什么呀？」妈妈正在整理菜篮子，笑着说：「家里的绿豆吃完了，我们去市场买一些。天气越来越热，正好可以煮绿豆汤。」小满立刻精神起来：「我也要去！我要帮妈妈买绿豆！」
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman rubs his eyes with one hand while running toward Mom; Mom smiles while organizing vegetables in a basket; Xiaoman bounces excitedly with fists clenched
scenes.environment: Bright morning kitchen with a window, counter with vegetable basket, pots on stove
scenes.composition: Mom on the left at counter, Xiaoman on the right running toward her, morning sunlight on the window in background
scenes.lighting: Soft warm morning sunlight streaming through window, gentle and cozy mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Medium shot, eye level. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman rubs his eyes with one hand while running toward Mom; Mom smiles while organizing vegetables in a basket; Xiaoman bounces excitedly with fists clenched. Bright morning kitchen with a window, counter with vegetable basket, pots on stove. Mom on the left at counter, Xiaoman on the right running toward her, morning sunlight on the window in background. Soft warm morning sunlight streaming through window, gentle and cozy mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 妈妈给小满戴好草帽，两个人提着布袋出门了。
scenes.visual_action: Mom adjusts a straw hat on Xiaoman's head; Xiaoman looks up smiling; both hold cloth bags, walking side by side out the door
scenes.environment: Apartment doorway opening to a sunlit street, potted plants by the entrance
scenes.composition: Figures in foreground stepping through doorway, street stretching into background, bright sky above
scenes.lighting: Bright outdoor daylight, cheerful and energetic mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Wide shot, low angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Mom adjusts a straw hat on Xiaoman's head; Xiaoman looks up smiling; both hold cloth bags, walking side by side out the door. scenes.story_text: 市场里热闹极了。卖青菜的摊位一片碧绿，西红柿像一盏盏红灯笼，圆滚滚的西瓜整齐地躺在竹筐里。空气中混着青草、泥土、水果和刚出炉的烧饼香味。小满一路东张西望，差点忘了今天要买什么。妈妈问：「我们来市场做什么？」小满马上回答：「买绿豆！」
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman looks around wide-eyed at the stalls, head turning in wonder; Mom leans down and asks; Xiaoman points forward confidently and answers
scenes.environment: Bustling open-air market with vegetable stalls, tomato pyramids, watermelons in bamboo baskets, a bread oven in the distance
scenes.composition: Market stalls filling the frame, Xiaoman and Mom small in middle ground, vendors and shoppers scattered throughout
scenes.lighting: Bright midday sunlight, vivid and lively mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Establishing shot, high angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman looks around wide-eyed at the stalls, head turning in wonder; Mom leans down and asks; Xiaoman points forward confidently and answers. Bustling open-air market with vegetable stalls, tomato pyramids, watermelons in bamboo baskets, a bread oven in the distance. Market stalls filling the frame, Xiaoman and Mom small in middle ground, vendors and shoppers scattered throughout. scenes.story_text: 粮食铺里摆着一排大口袋，里面装着大米、小米、红豆、黄豆和绿豆。绿豆小小的、圆圆的，表面泛着柔和的绿光。老板舀起一勺绿豆，让小满仔细看看。
scenes.visual_action: Boss scoops mung beans with a wooden ladle and holds it out; Xiaoman leans forward peering closely at the beans, hands at his sides
scenes.environment: Grain shop interior with large burlap sacks labeled by grain type, wooden counter, scoop and scale
scenes.composition: Boss behind counter on the left, ladle extended toward center; Xiaoman on the right leaning in; sacks in background
scenes.lighting: Warm interior light from shop lamp, intimate and curious mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Medium shot, over-the-shoulder from Xiaoman. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 50-year-old man, stocky build, bald with gray stubble, white vest and brown trousers, thick round glasses. Boss scoops mung beans with a wooden ladle and holds it out; Xiaoman leans forward peering closely at the beans, hands at his sides. Grain shop interior with large burlap sacks labeled by grain type, wooden counter, scoop and scale. scenes.story_text: 妈妈说：「好的绿豆要颗粒饱满，颜色自然，闻起来没有怪味。」小满捧起几颗绿豆，认真地看了又看：「它们像一群穿绿衣服的小种子。」妈妈买了一斤绿豆，老板把绿豆倒进纸袋，小满主动接过来，紧紧抱在怀里。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman cups a few beans in both palms examining them closely; then Boss pours beans into a paper bag; Xiaoman grabs the bag and hugs it tightly against his chest with a proud smile
scenes.environment: Grain shop counter with paper bag, scale, scattered beans on surface
scenes.composition: First: close-up of Xiaoman's palms with beans; then: medium shot of Xiaoman hugging the bag, Mom and Boss flanking him
scenes.lighting: Warm shop light, focused and earnest mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Close-up to medium shot. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek; 50-year-old man, stocky build, bald with gray stubble, white vest and brown trousers, thick round glasses. Xiaoman cups a few beans in both palms examining them closely; then Boss pours beans into a paper bag; Xiaoman grabs the bag and hugs it tightly against his chest with a proud smile. scenes.story_text: 回家的路上，小满听见纸袋里沙沙作响，觉得小绿豆像是在悄悄说话。他问妈妈绿豆是不是只能煮汤，妈妈说绿豆还能煮粥、做绿豆糕、发成绿豆芽。小满好奇地问绿豆真的会长大吗，妈妈说只要有水、空气和合适的温度，它们就可能醒过来。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman walks holding the paper bag to his ear, listening with wonder; Mom walks beside him gesturing as she explains; Xiaoman looks up at Mom with curious wide eyes
scenes.environment: Tree-lined residential street on the walk home, dappled shadows on sidewalk
scenes.composition: Both figures walking right to left in foreground, street and trees stretching into background
scenes.lighting: Warm afternoon sunlight through tree canopy, gentle and wonder-filled mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Wide shot, side angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman walks holding the paper bag to his ear, listening with wonder; Mom walks beside him gesturing as she explains; Xiaoman looks up at Mom with curious wide eyes. Tree-lined residential street on the walk home, dappled shadows on sidewalk. Both figures walking right to left in foreground, street and trees stretching into background. Warm afternoon sunlight through tree canopy, gentle and wonder-filled mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 回到家，妈妈把绿豆倒进白瓷盆里。小满发现里面夹着两颗小石子和几粒干瘪的豆子，便用手指一颗一颗挑出来。他问为什么要挑掉，妈妈说做饭之前要认真检查食材，这样煮出来的东西才干净，也更好吃。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman's fingers carefully pick out small stones and shriveled beans from the white basin; Mom points at the sorted items and explains; Xiaoman nods while concentrating
scenes.environment: Kitchen counter with white porcelain basin filled with green beans, small dish for discarded items
scenes.composition: Basin centered in frame, Xiaoman's hands and face leaning over it, Mom's hand pointing from the side
scenes.lighting: Bright kitchen light from above, focused and attentive mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Close-up, top-down angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman's fingers carefully pick out small stones and shriveled beans from the white basin; Mom points at the sorted items and explains; Xiaoman nods while concentrating. Kitchen counter with white porcelain basin filled with green beans, small dish for discarded items. Basin centered in frame, Xiaoman's hands and face leaning over it, Mom's hand pointing from the side. Bright kitchen light from above, focused and attentive mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 挑好绿豆后，小满打开水龙头。清水冲进盆里，绿豆们立刻滚动起来，发出细细的碰撞声。第一遍水有些浑，妈妈把水倒掉，又洗了两遍。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman turns the faucet handle; water rushes into the basin making beans swirl and tumble; Mom tilts the basin to pour out cloudy water; beans glisten after final rinse
scenes.environment: Kitchen sink with running faucet, white basin, drain
scenes.composition: Basin under faucet in center, water splash in foreground, Xiaoman's hand on faucet, Mom's hands tilting basin
scenes.lighting: Bright kitchen light with water reflections, fresh and lively mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Close-up, slight low angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman turns the faucet handle; water rushes into the basin making beans swirl and tumble; Mom tilts the basin to pour out cloudy water; beans glisten after final rinse. Bright kitchen light with water reflections, fresh and lively mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 接着他们把绿豆泡在水里。小满着急地问现在能不能煮，妈妈说还要等一会儿，泡过的绿豆更容易煮软。等待的时候，小满趴在桌边观察。绿豆慢慢吸进水分，颜色变得更鲜亮，身体也比刚买回来时胖了一点。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman lies on his stomach on the table, chin on hands, staring intently into the basin; Mom stands behind smiling; beans in the basin appear plumper and brighter green
scenes.environment: Kitchen table with soaked basin of beans, a clock on the wall
scenes.composition: Basin in foreground, Xiaoman's face close to it in profile, Mom behind in middle ground, clock on wall in background
scenes.lighting: Soft indoor afternoon light, calm and expectant mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Over-the-shoulder from Xiaoman. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Xiaoman lies on his stomach on the table, chin on hands, staring intently into the basin; Mom stands behind smiling; beans in the basin appear plumper and brighter green. Soft indoor afternoon light, calm and expectant mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 午后，妈妈把泡好的绿豆放进锅里，加入清水。火苗在锅底安静地燃烧，锅里渐渐响起咕嘟咕嘟的声音。小满想掀开锅盖看看，妈妈拦住了他：「锅里有滚烫的蒸汽，不能把脸靠近。开锅盖要让大人来。」
scenes.visual_action: Mom pours beans and water into a pot on the stove; Xiaoman reaches toward the pot lid; Mom gently blocks his hand and shakes her head with a firm but kind expression
scenes.environment: Kitchen stove with a pot, blue flame beneath, steam beginning to rise
scenes.composition: Stove and pot in center, Mom on left restraining Xiaoman's hand, Xiaoman on right with curious expression
scenes.lighting: Warm stove glow mixed with afternoon light, cautious and protective mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Medium shot, eye level. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Mom pours beans and water into a pot on the stove; Xiaoman reaches toward the pot lid; Mom gently blocks his hand and shakes her head with a firm but kind expression. Kitchen stove with a pot, blue flame beneath, steam beginning to rise. Stove and pot in center, Mom on left restraining Xiaoman's hand, Xiaoman on right with curious expression. Warm stove glow mixed with afternoon light, cautious and protective mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 妈妈戴上隔热手套，把锅盖朝外轻轻掀开。一团白雾升起来，绿豆已经裂开小口，露出浅黄色的豆仁。小满惊喜地说：「它们开花啦！」妈妈把火调小，让绿豆继续慢慢煮。过了一会儿，清水变成淡淡的绿色，豆香也飘满了厨房。
scenes.visual_action: Mom wearing oven mitt lifts the lid away from herself; a cloud of steam rises; Xiaoman peeks from the side with mouth open in delight; split beans visible in the pot with yellow interiors
scenes.environment: Stove top with steaming pot, oven mitt, rising steam cloud
scenes.composition: Pot and steam centered, Mom's mittened hand on lid on left, Xiaoman's amazed face peeking on right
scenes.lighting: Warm steam-softened light with stove glow, exciting and cozy mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Close-up, slight low angle. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist; 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Mom wearing oven mitt lifts the lid away from herself; a cloud of steam rises; Xiaoman peeks from the side with mouth open in delight; split beans visible in the pot with yellow interiors. Warm steam-softened light with stove glow, exciting and cozy mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 绿豆汤煮好后，妈妈盛出两碗，放在桌上晾凉。小满守在旁边，不停地问：「现在能喝了吗？」「再等等。」「现在呢？」「还烫。」「那现在呢？」
scenes.visual_action: Mom places two bowls of green soup on the table; Xiaoman stands beside the table bouncing on his toes, pointing at the bowl repeatedly; Mom holds up a palm signaling patience
scenes.environment: Kitchen table with two bowls of pale green mung bean soup, chairs, window showing afternoon light
scenes.composition: Table with bowls in center foreground, Xiaoman on left fidgeting, Mom on right calming him
scenes.lighting: Warm afternoon light from window, impatient yet warm mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Mom places two bowls of green soup on the table; Xiaoman stands beside the table bouncing on his toes, pointing at the bowl repeatedly; Mom holds up a palm signaling patience. Kitchen table with two bowls of pale green mung bean soup, chairs, window showing afternoon light. Table with bowls in center foreground, Xiaoman on left fidgeting, Mom on right calming him. Warm afternoon light from window, impatient yet warm mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 妈妈舀起一小勺，吹了吹，递到小满嘴边。小满尝了一口，绿豆软软的，汤里有清淡的香味。他说好喝可是没有外面卖的甜，妈妈说可以放一点冰糖但不用太多，食物原来的味道也很好。冰糖在温热的汤里慢慢融化，绿豆汤变得微甜，喝下去清爽又舒服。
scenes.visual_action: Mom holds a spoon to Xiaoman's lips blowing gently; Xiaoman sips and smiles; then Mom drops a small piece of rock sugar into the bowl; sugar dissolves visibly
scenes.environment: Kitchen table with bowls of soup, a small dish of rock sugar crystals
scenes.composition: Spoon and Xiaoman's face in foreground, bowl in middle ground, sugar dish in background
scenes.lighting: Soft warm indoor light, tender and satisfying mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Mom holds a spoon to Xiaoman's lips blowing gently; Xiaoman sips and smiles; then Mom drops a small piece of rock sugar into the bowl; sugar dissolves visibly. Soft warm indoor light, tender and satisfying mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 小满忽然想起妈妈说绿豆还能发芽，便从剩下的绿豆里数出二十颗，放进一个透明小碗。他给绿豆盖上湿纱布，把碗放在通风的地方。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman counts beans one by one with concentrated expression, places them into a transparent bowl, then carefully drapes a wet white cloth over the bowl; he sets the bowl on a windowsill
scenes.environment: Kitchen counter near a window, transparent small bowl, white gauze cloth, remaining beans in bag
scenes.composition: Xiaoman centered placing the bowl on the windowsill, window in background showing daylight
scenes.lighting: Soft natural light from window, hopeful and purposeful mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Medium shot, eye level. 6-year-old boy, slim build, round face with short black hair, light blue t-shirt and khaki shorts, small woven bracelet on left wrist. Xiaoman counts beans one by one with concentrated expression, places them into a transparent bowl, then carefully drapes a wet white cloth over the bowl; he sets the bowl on a windowsill. Kitchen counter near a window, transparent small bowl, white gauze cloth, remaining beans in bag. Xiaoman centered placing the bowl on the windowsill, window in background showing daylight. Soft natural light from window, hopeful and purposeful mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 第二天早晨，小满一起床就跑去看绿豆，几颗豆子的外皮裂开了，露出白白的小点。第三天，白点变成了短短的小尾巴。第四天，豆芽又长高了一截，弯弯曲曲地挤在一起。小满每天换水，也一直记着妈妈的话：豆芽需要湿润，却不能一直泡在积水里。
scenes.shot: Close-up, side angle with time progression
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman peeks at the transparent bowl with eager expression; three stages shown: beans with cracked skins and white dots, beans with short curly tails, beans with longer tangled sprouts; Xiaoman gently pours fresh water into the bowl
scenes.environment: Windowsill with transparent bowl, wet gauze cloth, morning light
scenes.composition: Bowl in foreground showing sprouting stages, Xiaoman's face reflected through the glass, window behind
scenes.lighting: Fresh morning light growing brighter across stages, wonder and diligence mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Windowsill with transparent bowl, wet gauze cloth, morning light. Bowl in foreground showing sprouting stages, Xiaoman's face reflected through the glass, window behind. Fresh morning light growing brighter across stages, wonder and diligence mood. clean illustration with no typography, no signs, no labels, no captions, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no speech bubbles

scenes.story_text: 几天后，妈妈把长好的豆芽洗干净，和胡萝卜丝一起炒成了一盘清脆的小菜。
scenes.visual_action: Mom stands at the stove tossing bean sprouts and shredded orange carrots in a wok; steam rises; she smiles contentedly
scenes.environment: Kitchen stove with wok, spatula, washed bean sprouts on a plate, orange carrot shreds on cutting board
scenes.composition: Mom and wok in center, flames below, ingredients on the side, steam rising into frame top
scenes.lighting: Warm stove glow and overhead light, lively and rewarding mood
scenes.prompt: Warm watercolor illustration, soft brush lines, earth-tone palette with fresh green accents, natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, contemporary Chinese urban domestic setting, suitable for ages 3-6. Medium shot, low angle. 30-year-old woman, medium build, gentle face with black hair in low bun, cream blouse and brown apron, small mole on left cheek. Mom stands at the stove tossing bean sprouts and shredded orange carrots in a wok; steam rises; she smiles contentedly. Kitchen stove with wok, spatula, washed bean sprouts on a plate, orange carrot shreds on cutting board. Mom and wok in center, flames below, ingredients on the side, steam rising into frame top. scenes.story_text: 晚饭时，小满吃着自己照料的豆芽，觉得比平常的菜更香。他说：「妈妈，一袋绿豆能做好多事情，能煮汤，能发芽，还能让我学会等待。」妈妈点点头：「从市场到餐桌，每一样食物都要经过许多步骤。认真挑选、清洗、烹煮，也是在珍惜食物。」

scenes.story_text: 小满看着碗里最后几颗绿豆，舍不得浪费，便一颗一颗吃得干干净净。窗外傍晚的风轻轻吹过，厨房里还留着淡淡的豆香。小满已经开始期待下一次和妈妈去市场了，他想下次除了绿豆也许还可以买一小袋红豆。不过在那之前，他要先把今天学会的事牢牢记住：小小的豆子不会立刻变成香甜的汤，也不会一夜之间长成豆芽，只要认真照料、耐心等待，平凡的小种子也会带来令人惊喜的变化。
scenes.visual_action: Xiaoman picks the last beans from his bowl one by one with chopsticks and eats them; he gazes toward the open window with a peaceful, thoughtful expression; a gentle breeze stirs the curtain

scenes.lighting: Soft golden evening light from window, peaceful and contemplative mood
